title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd:
AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
